visa_types.name: Student
visa_types.documents_required:
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- Original passport valid for at least equal to or greater than the duration of the requested visa.
- Passport BIO pages copy & copies of valid visas pages.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Proof of the University or the Center for Studies certifying the final acceptance to the University or Research Center. This instrument produced must specify the level of studies to be performed, the subsidiary or institution selected and the duration of the program.
- Document certifying the scholarship (if applicable) or the institution's financial support will cover studies in the case studies are funded by an institution in their country of origin or a scholarship. This document must specify what amount of financial support or scholarship, as well as the duration for which it was intended. In both cases, this record must be written on letterhead and certified by the institution.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of general health status of the applicant and indicating if it suffers from some kind of contagious disease. Must be issued by the relevant health authorities of the last country in which the person was domiciled. In the event that you reside in the Dominican Republic, this certificate must be issued by medical laboratory, clinic or hospital registered by the Ministry of Public Health.
- No Criminal Record Certificate issued by the appropriate authorities of the last country in which the person was domiciled. If the applicant has resided in the Dominican Republic that document must be issued by the Attorney General of the Republic. Not required for minors.
- Authorization from parents or guardian, when it is a minor and who asked is not the father or mother. In this case, it is required that the parent that is not manifest in the Dominican Republic in accordance with the other parent to take to live in the Dominican Republic at the lowest.
- Documents proving financial solvency (bank letter, job letter, property deeds, etc..). If any document is issued in the Dominican Republic, must be certified by a notary public and legalized by the Attorney General of the Republic.
- Application letter addressed to the consular post by the person concerned or his representative, requesting a student visa, including the name and nationality.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa Fees: 

[Table:Student]
Please Note:
- Visa Fee needs to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission at the visa application center.
VFS Logistic Fee:

[Table:Student]
Please note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The above fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.
visa_types.processing_time:
Normal Application Processing Time: Minimum 10 calendar days 
Please  Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.
visa_types.forms:
You must submit the dully filled visa application form signed by the applicant for a visa with the relevant documentation as listed on this website.
Visa Application Form
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Student visa issued for study purpose in Dominican Republic.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Student visa issued for study purpose in Dominican Republic.

## Visa Fees
Visa Fees: 

[Table:Student]
Please Note:
- Visa Fee needs to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission at the visa application center.
VFS Logistic Fee:

[Table:Student]
Please note:
- VFS Logistic charges to be paid in Cash/POS/UPI at the time of submission.
- There is no exemption for VFS Service charge.
- The above fee is non-refundable and non-transferable.

## Documents Required
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- Original passport valid for at least equal to or greater than the duration of the requested visa.
- Passport BIO pages copy & copies of valid visas pages.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Proof of the University or the Center for Studies certifying the final acceptance to the University or Research Center. This instrument produced must specify the level of studies to be performed, the subsidiary or institution selected and the duration of the program.
- Document certifying the scholarship (if applicable) or the institution's financial support will cover studies in the case studies are funded by an institution in their country of origin or a scholarship. This document must specify what amount of financial support or scholarship, as well as the duration for which it was intended. In both cases, this record must be written on letterhead and certified by the institution.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of general health status of the applicant and indicating if it suffers from some kind of contagious disease. Must be issued by the relevant health authorities of the last country in which the person was domiciled. In the event that you reside in the Dominican Republic, this certificate must be issued by medical laboratory, clinic or hospital registered by the Ministry of Public Health.
- No Criminal Record Certificate issued by the appropriate authorities of the last country in which the person was domiciled. If the applicant has resided in the Dominican Republic that document must be issued by the Attorney General of the Republic. Not required for minors.
- Authorization from parents or guardian, when it is a minor and who asked is not the father or mother. In this case, it is required that the parent that is not manifest in the Dominican Republic in accordance with the other parent to take to live in the Dominican Republic at the lowest.
- Documents proving financial solvency (bank letter, job letter, property deeds, etc..). If any document is issued in the Dominican Republic, must be certified by a notary public and legalized by the Attorney General of the Republic.
- Application letter addressed to the consular post by the person concerned or his representative, requesting a student visa, including the name and nationality.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be
                                apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent. Teeth
                                should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Normal Application Processing Time: Minimum 10 calendar days 
Please  Note: -
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.

## Download Forms
You must submit the dully filled visa application form signed by the applicant for a visa with the relevant documentation as listed on this website.
Visa Application Form

visa_types.name: Residence
visa_types.documents_required:
Residence by Family Reunification
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Covering letter from applicant –explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Marriage Certificate
- If one of the parties is a Dominican and his / her marriage was abroad:
Marriage certificate transcribed before the Civil Registry of the Central Board Electoral (JCE). Law No. 659-44 on acts of civil status, art. Numeral 14.
(duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- If both parties are foreigners and their marriage was abroad:
Marriage certificate. If it is written in a language other than Spanish,
(duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Economic Solvency of the applicant
- Bank Letter: Date of opening of an account, annual average balance maintained during the year, Date of last Deposit.
(submitted along with its translation in Spanish)
- Labor letter
- Copies of Certificates of securities of movable Property
- Copies of Fixed Deposits
- Certification of pension income
- Any other document that shows the economic solvency
- Warranty letter or Invitation letter.
- By which the guarantor is responsible for the expenses of maintenance and repatriation, respect to the moral and economic conditions of the foreigner, Signed by the guarantor and two witnesses, who will be the guarantor before the DGM in its application process.
(duly notarized and legalized by Procuduria General)
Residence by Investment
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Covering letter from applicant – explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Certificate of Investor by the CEI-RD
- These documents will be presented in original. The income received in wages do not apply.
Residence by Rentist (A Person who Generates Income with his/her own Investment)
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- Covering letter from applicant – explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Renner with personal investment in Dominican Republic Documents showing personal investment carried out in the Dominican territory. (Copy real estate titles, company documents-Demonstrate that it is operating with the requirements established by the Ministry of labor, bank certificates in DR)
- Renner with personal investment in his country of origin: Deposit the financial document of the institution from which the funds are accumulated, as specified in Law 171-07, Article 1:
- These documents will be presented in original. The income received in wages do not apply.
- NOTE: In order to benefit from the preferential regime established in Law 171-07, Pensioners or Retirees and Foreign Rentistas must receive Monthly income according to the following scale:
The minimum amount of income for the Pensioner is US $ 1,500.00 dollars or Equivalent in pesos, and the Renant of US $ 2,000.00 or the equivalent in Dominican pesos.
Residence by Pension / Retirement
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- Covering letter from applicant – explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Certification of government, official body or private enterprise of origin Foreigner, where he/she rendered his/her services. It must contain the information as the general data of the applicant, position held in the company and the amount perceived as pension. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation)
- Certification of government, official body or private enterprise of origin Foreigner, where he/she rendered his/her services. It must contain the information as the general data of the applicant, position held in the company and the amount perceived as pension. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation)
- NOTE: In order to benefit from the preferential regime established in Law 171-07, Pensioners or Retirees and Foreign Rentistas must receive an Monthly income according to the following scale:
The minimum amount of income for the Pensioner is US $ 1,500.00 dollars or Equivalent in pesos, and the Renant of US $ 2,000.00 or the equivalent in Dominican pesos.

- Residence by pension / Retirement.

- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- Covering letter from applicant – explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Renner with personal investment in Dominican Republic Documents showing personal investment carried out in the Dominican territory. (Copy real estate titles, company documents-Demonstrate that it is operating with the requirements established by the Ministry of labor, bank certificates in DR)
- Renner with personal investment in his country of origin: Deposit the financial document of the institution from which the funds are accumulated, as specified in Law 171-07, Article 1:
- These documents will be presented in original. The income received in wages do not apply.
- NOTE: In order to benefit from the preferential regime established in Law 171-07, Pensioners or Retirees and Foreign Rentistas must receive Monthly income according to the following scale:
The minimum amount of income for the Pensioner is US $ 1,500.00 dollars or Equivalent in pesos, and the Renant of US $ 2,000.00 or the equivalent in Dominican pesos.
Residence by Pension / Retirement
- Fully completed visa application form must be completed computerized in block letters.
- One recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) white background photograph (Do not Staple the photographs)
- Original passport valid for at least 18 months.
- Covering letter from applicant – explaining the purpose of obtaining residency. (duly signed and to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- National Identity Document of the country of Nationality and legible photocopy of the Residence Card, if you reside in a Second country.
- Medical Certificate presenting a diagnosis of the general health of the applicant and indicating if he or she has any type of Infectious illness. (to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Police Clearance Certificate of No Criminal Background (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Birth Certificate. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation).
- Certification of government, official body or private enterprise of origin Foreigner, where he/she rendered his/her services. It must contain the information as the general data of the applicant, position held in the company and the amount perceived as pension. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation)
- Certification of government, official body or private enterprise of origin Foreigner, where he/she rendered his/her services. It must contain the information as the general data of the applicant, position held in the company and the amount perceived as pension. (duly legalized or apostilled, to be submitted along with its SPANISH translation)
- NOTE: In order to benefit from the preferential regime established in Law 171-07, Pensioners or Retirees and Foreign Rentistas must receive an Monthly income according to the following scale:
The minimum amount of income for the Pensioner is US $ 1,500.00 dollars or Equivalent in pesos, and the Renant of US $ 2,000.00 or the equivalent in Dominican pesos.

## Photo Specifications
- The photograph must be in color.
- It should be without border.
- It should have a white background only.
- It should have a close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70-80% of the photograph.
- It should be in sharp focus and clean.
- It should be of high quality with no ink marks and creases.
- The photograph must show you looking directly at the camera.
- It should be 3.5 cm X 4.5 cm.
- It should show your skin tone naturally.
- It should have appropriate brightness and contrast.
- The photograph should be a recent one not more than 1 month old.
- It is to be taken without headgear.
- Photograph can be taken with headgear, after consideration on case to case basis if the applicant wears headgear on religious grounds. The main characteristics of the face must be
                                apparent from the photograph. Chin, nose, eyes, ears and eyebrows must not be covered; the forehead should be uncovered to the extent that the shape of the face is apparent. Teeth
                                should not be visible.
- It should be without hat/cap.
- The photograph should not have any staple marks.
- Scanned & color photocopies would NOT be accepted.

## Processing Time
Normal Application Processing Time: Minimum 10 calendar days
Please Note: - 
Please note that this is an indicative processing time only. Processing time may increase or decrease at the discretion of the Embassy of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.
VFS Global is involved only in non-judgmental task of visa processing and does not play any role in processing the visa application as this is entirely the prerogative of the Embassy
                              of the Dominican Republic; New Delhi.

## Download Forms
You must submit the dully filled visa application form signed by the applicant for a visa with the relevant documentation as listed on this website.
